headline: United Rentals (URI) Stock Gets Fair Value Bump After Mixed Analyst Price Targets
summary: United Rentals is back in focus after a fresh valuation update lifted its fair value estimate from US$1,084.25 to US$1,120.00, resetting the price target that sits at the center of many models. That shift lines up with recent analyst commentary that includes a cluster of higher targets, offset by some cuts that flag debate around how much execution and growth are already reflected in the stock. Read on to see how these changing targets fit into the wider narrative and how you can track the...

headline: UBS Maintains Buy on United Rentals, Raises Price Target to $1300
summary: UBS  analyst Steven Fisher   maintains United Rentals (NYSE:URI) with a Buy and raises the price target from $1145 to $1300.
